capabilities.title: Kernel Capabilities
capabilities.desc: Optional kernel features that can extend ZeroMount
capabilities.vfsDriverDesc: Kernel-level filesystem redirection. Requires a custom kernel with the ZeroMount VFS patch applied.
capabilities.kstatRedirectDesc: Extended file metadata spoofing. Requires SUSFS with kstat_redirect support compiled into the kernel.
capabilities.overlayFsDesc: Stacked filesystem mounts. Requires CONFIG_OVERLAY_FS enabled in kernel config.
capabilities.susfsDesc: Kernel-level hiding and spoofing. Requires SUSFS patches applied to the kernel source.
